noticeJa: 非本番の設計資料。runtimeから参照しない。正式データではない。正式キャラクターIDを発行していない。正式画像パスを使用していない。

project.name: WORLDAWN
experienceFlow: scan a barcode or QR code
receive an official per-character discovery number
record the encounter in dex, history, and calendar
desiredFeelings: want to keep in the dex

commercialGoal.goal: Build an independent long-term original character collection IP whose characters users may choose beside popular character IPs.

rarityPolicy.role: clear, approachable, one strong individual quality, rewarding to discover
unusual real organism, deep-sea or luminous organism, or distinctive ecology
mythology, folklore, fantasy organism, UMA, or world-significant presence

preservedArchitecture: do not require one species to equal one character
allow a small number of purposeful motifs
preserve discovery history and official discovery numbers
validate from silhouette before finished illustration
do not mass-produce before all three flagships pass
do not let AI score user preference

phase2BDecision.gate1Result: No silhouette created sufficient interest to proceed to Gate 2.
